label: the old man on nineteen
description: A lone ham operator broadcasting out of the Ironworks — a real person trading news, rumor, and the occasional lie (GDD XIII). A local signal: reachable and FAINT from adjacent Rivermouth, clear once you are in the Ironworks. Goes silent when the Ironworks is overrun. The leads he passes are honest-sounding prose here; turning them into resolvable, variably-reliable leads is the FR-STY-05 rumor system (deferred).

messages.live: ...for anyone still listening, this is the old man on nineteen. Word from the hill: the pharmacy off the terraces still had stock two days back, but the whole block's gone loud since — go careful, or don't go. I'll be here as long as the batteries and I both last.
messages.dead: Nineteen's been dead a while now. The old man said he'd be here as long as his batteries lasted. I suppose they didn't.

notes: reach=local, regionId=region.ironworks (adjacent to the rivermouth start ⇒ audible FAINT from turn 1, LIVE once in-region). A 'real person' relaying leads/rumor/lies (FR-STY-05 seam).
